rulings.Case Title: K. MIRANDA ET AL VS. RICHARD LEWIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entrey Of Judgement Pursuant To Stipulation Of Entry Of Judgment; Memo Of P&A; Declaration And Supporting Docs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 07, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF K. MIRANDA Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgement Pursuant To Stipulation Of Entry Of Judgment Hearing Required. Defendants' counsel to file a declaration no later than 9:00 a.m. on August 7, 2019 stating (1) whether and (2) when this motion was received. No other information/argument to be included. Defendant to be prepared to tender $4,640 at the time of the hearing. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: (Amended) Mtn For Order For Entry Of Judgmnt

rulings.Case Title: SALVADOR SEGOVIA VS. CHARLEMAGNE EVANGELISTA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 07, 2019 line 6. PLAINTIFF SALVADOR SEGOVIA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to provide complete verified responses to From Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $660 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/CFH)
